CardApprove AI
HomeCheck EligibilityAbout
Machine Learning Project

Credit Card Approval
Prediction System

Enter applicant information and let a trained machine learning model estimate the likelihood of credit card approval. This tool is built for educational and project demonstration purposes.

Check Eligibility About This Project

Disclaimer: This prediction is based on a trained machine learning model and is for educational/demo purposes only. It does not guarantee final approval by any bank.

Privacy: Input data is used only for prediction and is not permanently stored.

Why Use This Tool?

A simple, reliable way to explore ML-based credit card approval prediction.

Fast Prediction

Enter applicant details and receive a model-based prediction in under a second.

Data-Driven Model

Built on the UCI Credit Card Approval dataset using logistic regression with standardised features.

Simple Eligibility Check

A straightforward interface designed for research and project demonstration — no sign-up needed.

How It Works

1

Enter Applicant Details

Fill in personal, financial, and employment information across structured form sections.

2

Model Processes the Input

The trained ML model evaluates over 15 features and computes an approval probability score.

3

View Approval Prediction

A clear result is displayed — Approved or Rejected — with a model confidence percentage.

Model Overview

Problem TypeBinary classification (Approved / Rejected)
Features UsedApplicant financial and demographic attributes
PurposeApproval prediction research and project demonstration

Ready to run a prediction?

Fill in the applicant details form and get an instant model-based result.

No sign-up required Instant result For demo use only
Start Prediction
